items.title: Canada Dollar Hits 2026 Low as Traders See Central Bank on Hold
items.content: The Canadian dollar slid to its lowest level since December on Tuesday, as traders anticipated the Bank of Canada will be slower than its global peers to raise interest rates.
items.contentSnippet: The Canadian dollar slid to its lowest level since December on Tuesday, as traders anticipated the Bank of Canada will be slower than its global peers to raise interest rates.
items.creator: George Lei

summaries.zh: 加元汇率于周二跌至2026年12月以来最低水平，主要原因在于市场预期加拿大央行的加息步伐将较全球其他主要央行更为缓慢。
summaries.en: The Canadian dollar fell to its lowest level since December on Tuesday as traders anticipate the Bank of Canada will raise interest rates later than other major central banks.

items.summary: 加元汇率于周二跌至2026年12月以来最低水平，主要原因在于市场预期加拿大央行的加息步伐将较全球其他主要央行更为缓慢。

items.title: Technology Megacaps Tumble as Rotation Trade Gathers Momentum
items.content: US stocks extended their slide Tuesday afternoon as a rotation out of technology stocks that propelled the market higher for most of the year gained traction.
items.contentSnippet: US stocks extended their slide Tuesday afternoon as a rotation out of technology stocks that propelled the market higher for most of the year gained traction.
items.creator: Jess Menton

summaries.zh: 美股科技巨头股价周二午后持续下跌，年初以来推动市场上涨的科技股轮动交易趋势进一步增强。
summaries.en: US stocks fell further on Tuesday afternoon as investor rotation out of technology stocks continued. This shift away from tech, which had driven most of the market's gains this year, gained momentum during the session.

items.summary: 美股科技巨头股价周二午后持续下跌，年初以来推动市场上涨的科技股轮动交易趋势进一步增强。

items.title: Nasdaq 100 Sinks 4% as Chipmakers Sell Off Again: Markets Wrap
items.content: A rotation that has seen investors bail from richly priced technology names in favor of more economically sensitive industries resumed, dragging down the S&P 500 while lifting the majority of its companies.
items.contentSnippet: A rotation that has seen investors bail from richly priced technology names in favor of more economically sensitive industries resumed, dragging down the S&P 500 while lifting the majority of its companies.
items.creator: Rita Nazareth

summaries.zh: 纳斯达克100指数下跌4%，主要芯片制造商股票再度遭到抛售。市场资金正从估值较高的科技股向对经济周期更敏感的行业转移。这一轮动导致标普500指数整体承压，但其中多数成分股录得上涨。
summaries.en: The Nasdaq 100 index fell 4%, driven by a renewed sell-off in semiconductor stocks. This decline reflects a continuing market rotation where investors are moving capital from high-technology stocks toward sectors considered more sensitive to economic growth. This shift negatively impacted the overall S&P 500, even though it gained value for the majority of its constituent companies.

items.summary: 纳斯达克100指数下跌4%，主要芯片制造商股票再度遭到抛售。市场资金正从估值较高的科技股向对经济周期更敏感的行业转移。这一轮动导致标普500指数整体承压，但其中多数成分股录得上涨。

items.title: Brent Crude Falls Below $90 a Barrel as China Slashes Imports
items.content: Brent crude oil, the global benchmark, dipped to its lowest level since April on growing signs that demand is plunging to counter supply losses from the Iran war.
items.contentSnippet: Brent crude oil, the global benchmark, dipped to its lowest level since April on growing signs that demand is plunging to counter supply losses from the Iran war.
items.creator: Nicholas Lua, Alex Longley, Will Kubzansky

summaries.zh: 布伦特原油价格跌至每桶90美元以下，为4月以来最低水平。此下跌主要源于中国大幅削减原油进口，导致全球需求下降，抵消了伊朗战争造成的供应损失影响。
summaries.en: Brent crude oil prices fell below $90 per barrel, reaching their lowest since April. The decline is attributed to reduced demand, particularly as China cuts its oil imports. This drop in demand is seen as counterbalancing supply concerns linked to geopolitical tensions in the Iran region. The movement highlights the market's reaction to shifting consumption patterns amid ongoing supply-side uncertainties.

items.summary: 布伦特原油价格跌至每桶90美元以下，为4月以来最低水平。此下跌主要源于中国大幅削减原油进口，导致全球需求下降，抵消了伊朗战争造成的供应损失影响。

items.title: Treasuries Advance Before Auction as Oil Prices Retreat Further
items.content: Treasuries rose as benchmark oil prices declined to the lowest levels in more than a month, alleviating concern about elevated inflation ahead of Wednesday’s release of the May consumer price index.
items.contentSnippet: Treasuries rose as benchmark oil prices declined to the lowest levels in more than a month, alleviating concern about elevated inflation ahead of Wednesday’s release of the May consumer price index.
items.creator: Elizabeth Stanton

summaries.zh: 国际油价跌至一个月低位，缓解了通胀担忧。受此影响，美国国债收益率走低，投资者等待将于周三公布的五月消费者价格指数数据。
summaries.en: U.S. Treasury prices increased as oil prices fell to their lowest level in over a month. This decline eased worries about high inflation, occurring ahead of the scheduled May consumer price index report.

items.summary: 国际油价跌至一个月低位，缓解了通胀担忧。受此影响，美国国债收益率走低，投资者等待将于周三公布的五月消费者价格指数数据。

items.title: Boots Owner in Talks on Possible $10 Billion Sale, FT Says
items.content: The owner of Boots is talking to parties including the billionaire Weston family and Australian pharmacy group Sigma Healthcare Ltd. about a $10 billion sale of the UK health and beauty retail business, according to the Financial Times.
items.contentSnippet: The owner of Boots is talking to parties including the billionaire Weston family and Australian pharmacy group Sigma Healthcare Ltd. about a $10 billion sale of the UK health and beauty retail business, according to the Financial Times.
items.creator: Deirdre Hipwell, Katie Linsell

summaries.zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，健康与美容零售商Boots的所有者正与包括亿万富翁韦斯顿家族及澳大利亚连锁药店Sigma Healthcare在内的多方进行洽谈，可能以100亿美元出售该英国业务。
summaries.en: According to the Financial Times, the owner of Boots is in talks with potential buyers, including the billionaire Weston family and Australia's Sigma Healthcare Ltd., regarding a possible $10 billion sale of the UK health and beauty retail chain.

items.summary: 据英国《金融时报》报道，健康与美容零售商Boots的所有者正与包括亿万富翁韦斯顿家族及澳大利亚连锁药店Sigma Healthcare在内的多方进行洽谈，可能以100亿美元出售该英国业务。

items.title: Apollo’s Shutterfly Sweetens Debt as Investors Weigh AI Risk
items.content: Shutterfly has sweetened terms on a portion of a critical debt refinancing, in a bid to assuage investors spooked by potential AI disruption and widening losses.
items.contentSnippet: Shutterfly has sweetened terms on a portion of a critical debt refinancing, in a bid to assuage investors spooked by potential AI disruption and widening losses.
items.creator: Michelle Cheng, Gowri Gurumurthy

summaries.zh: Apollo旗下Shutterfly为安抚因人工智能技术冲击和亏损扩大而担忧的投资者，调整了部分关键债务重组条款，以优化债务结构。
summaries.en: Shutterfly has improved the terms of a portion of its debt refinancing to reassure investors concerned about potential disruption from artificial intelligence and the company's growing financial losses.

items.summary: Apollo旗下Shutterfly为安抚因人工智能技术冲击和亏损扩大而担忧的投资者，调整了部分关键债务重组条款，以优化债务结构。

items.title: Private Equity Founder Constantino Ran Firm in ‘Drunken Haze,’ Ex-COO Says
items.content: On a Dominican Republic vacation five years ago, private equity boss Matthew Constantino almost died.
items.contentSnippet: On a Dominican Republic vacation five years ago, private equity boss Matthew Constantino almost died.
items.creator: Chris Dolmetsch

summaries.zh: 私募股权公司创始人马修·科斯坦蒂诺在五年前于多米尼加共和国度假时险些丧生。据其前首席运营官所述，科斯坦蒂诺当时常处于“醉酒般的状态”来管理公司。
summaries.en: A private equity founder, Matthew Constantino, nearly died during a vacation in the Dominican Republic five years ago. According to the article, a former COO alleged that Constantino ran his firm in a "drunken haze."

items.summary: 私募股权公司创始人马修·科斯坦蒂诺在五年前于多米尼加共和国度假时险些丧生。据其前首席运营官所述，科斯坦蒂诺当时常处于“醉酒般的状态”来管理公司。

items.title: First Brands Wins Second Chance to Pursue Liquidation Plan
items.content: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands can make a second attempt to win court approval for a creditor vote of a proposal to raise money through lawsuits against the company’s former top officers and lenders, a judge said Monday.
items.contentSnippet: Bankrupt auto-parts maker First Brands can make a second attempt to win court approval for a creditor vote of a proposal to raise money through lawsuits against the company’s former top officers and lenders, a judge said Monday.
items.creator: Steven Church, Owen McCarthy

summaries.zh: 破产汽车零部件制造商First Brands获得法官批准，可就其清算计划进行第二次债权人投票尝试。该计划旨在通过起诉公司前高管及贷款方筹集资金。
summaries.en: Bankrupt auto-parts manufacturer First Brands has been granted a second opportunity by a court to seek approval for a creditor vote on its liquidation plan. The proposal aims to raise funds through lawsuits targeting the company's former senior executives and lenders. A judge made this ruling on Monday, allowing the company to proceed with its reorganization attempt.

items.summary: 破产汽车零部件制造商First Brands获得法官批准，可就其清算计划进行第二次债权人投票尝试。该计划旨在通过起诉公司前高管及贷款方筹集资金。

items.title: Senegal Faces New Debt Scrutiny Without IMF Deal, S&P Warns
items.content: Senegal’s public finances are under pressure and failure to win fresh support from the International Monetary Fund will harden concerns about its outlook, S&P Global Ratings warned.
items.contentSnippet: Senegal’s public finances are under pressure and failure to win fresh support from the International Monetary Fund will harden concerns about its outlook, S&P Global Ratings warned.
items.creator: Abeer Abu Omar

summaries.zh: 标普全球评级警告，塞内加尔公共财政正承受压力，若无法获得国际货币基金组织新的援助支持，外界对其债务前景的担忧将会加剧。
summaries.en: S&P Global Ratings has issued a warning regarding Senegal's economic outlook. The agency states that the country's public finances are under pressure, and failure to secure a new agreement with the International Monetary Fund will heighten concerns about its fiscal health and future prospects.

items.summary: 标普全球评级警告，塞内加尔公共财政正承受压力，若无法获得国际货币基金组织新的援助支持，外界对其债务前景的担忧将会加剧。

items.title: Gold Resumes Pullback as Fed Hike Bets Build, Technicals Weaken
items.content: Gold resumed declines as traders focused on the prospect of prolonged energy-market tightness despite Israel and Iran agreeing to end attacks and as some investors reacted to negative technical signals.
items.contentSnippet: Gold resumed declines as traders focused on the prospect of prolonged energy-market tightness despite Israel and Iran agreeing to end attacks and as some investors reacted to negative technical signals.
items.creator: James Attwood, Yihui Xie

summaries.zh: 受能源市场持续紧张预期及以色列-伊朗停火协议影响，投资者关注点转移。叠加美联储加息预期升温与技术面走弱信号，黄金价格重启下跌。市场情绪谨慎，短期承压。
summaries.en: Gold prices are falling again as investors focus on expected prolonged tightness in energy markets, despite a ceasefire between Israel and Iran. This downward trend is also driven by negative technical trading signals. The move reflects concerns that persistent energy supply issues could keep interest rates higher for longer, which typically weighs on non-yielding assets like gold.

items.summary: 受能源市场持续紧张预期及以色列-伊朗停火协议影响，投资者关注点转移。叠加美联储加息预期升温与技术面走弱信号，黄金价格重启下跌。市场情绪谨慎，短期承压。

items.title: Inflated ‘Private’ Ratings Are Masking Credit Risk, Columbia Study Says
items.content: Ratings that underpin a growing slice of the $1.8 trillion private-credit market, the hottest corner of Wall Street in recent years, are systematically understating investment risk, according to a new study by Columbia Business School researchers.
items.contentSnippet: Ratings that underpin a growing slice of the $1.8 trillion private-credit market, the hottest corner of Wall Street in recent years, are systematically understating investment risk, according to a new study by Columbia Business School researchers.
items.creator: Weihua Li, Zachary R Mider, Alex Rajbhandari

summaries.zh: 哥伦比亚商学院研究指出，支撑1.8万亿美元私人信贷市场的评级体系存在系统性低估投资风险的问题。
summaries.en: A Columbia Business School study finds that ratings in the $1.8 trillion private-credit market are systematically understating investment risk. Researchers argue these inflated ratings mask the true financial danger underlying this rapidly growing sector.

items.summary: 哥伦比亚商学院研究指出，支撑1.8万亿美元私人信贷市场的评级体系存在系统性低估投资风险的问题。

items.title: JPMorgan-Led Group Plan Sale of Qualtrics’ Hung Debt at Year End
items.content: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is planning to offload about $5.3 billion in financing for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. later this year in a bid to shift the hung debt off their books.
items.contentSnippet: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is planning to offload about $5.3 billion in financing for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. later this year in a bid to shift the hung debt off their books.
items.creator: Claire Ruckin

summaries.zh: 摩根大通牵头的银行集团计划在年底前出售与软件公司Qualtrics相关的约53亿美元债务，以清理其资产负债表。
summaries.en: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase plans to sell approximately $5.3 billion in debt tied to software company Qualtrics International later this year. The move aims to remove this "hung debt" from the banks' balance sheets.

items.summary: 摩根大通牵头的银行集团计划在年底前出售与软件公司Qualtrics相关的约53亿美元债务，以清理其资产负债表。

items.title: Kenya Retains Benchmark Interest Rate for Second Time
items.content: Kenya’s central bank left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the second time in a row, as it monitors the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran on the economy.
items.contentSnippet: Kenya’s central bank left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the second time in a row, as it monitors the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran on the economy.
items.creator: David Herbling

summaries.zh: 肯尼亚央行连续第二次维持基准利率不变，以持续评估伊朗冲突对经济的影响。
summaries.en: Kenya's central bank has maintained its benchmark interest rate for the second consecutive time. The decision was made as the bank continues to assess the economic impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran.

items.summary: 肯尼亚央行连续第二次维持基准利率不变，以持续评估伊朗冲突对经济的影响。

items.title: BP CEO Shakes Up Structure in Push Back to Oil and Gas
items.content: New BP Plc Chief Executive Officer Meg O’Neill reorganized the energy giant’s leadership and reporting structures in an overhaul that cements the company’s focus on oil and gas as it tries to move beyond recent boardroom drama.
items.contentSnippet: New BP Plc Chief Executive Officer Meg O’Neill reorganized the energy giant’s leadership and reporting structures in an overhaul that cements the company’s focus on oil and gas as it tries to move beyond recent boardroom drama.
items.creator: Mitchell Ferman

summaries.zh: BP首席执行官梅格·奥尼尔对集团领导层和汇报结构进行了重组，此举旨在明确公司对油气业务的聚焦方向，并以此作为应对近期董事会风波的调整举措。
summaries.en: BP’s new CEO, Meg O’Neill, has restructured the company’s leadership and reporting lines. This overhaul reinforces BP’s focus on its core oil and gas operations, following recent internal challenges.

items.summary: BP首席执行官梅格·奥尼尔对集团领导层和汇报结构进行了重组，此举旨在明确公司对油气业务的聚焦方向，并以此作为应对近期董事会风波的调整举措。

items.title: JPMorgan Strategist Expects CPI Above 4% with Signs of Easing Energy Inflation
items.content: Meera Pandit, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discusses expectations for the upcoming U.S. CPI report, forecasting a print above 4%. She highlights that gasoline prices peaked in late May and have been declining, which could lead to reduced energy inflation pressure in subsequent reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Meera Pandit, Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discusses expectations for the upcoming U.S. CPI report, forecasting a print above 4%. She highlights that gasoline prices peaked in late May and have been declining, which could lead to reduced energy inflation pressure in subsequent reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 摩根大通资产管理公司全球市场策略师梅拉·潘迪特预测，即将发布的美国CPI数据将高于4%。她同时指出，汽油价格已于5月底达到峰值并持续回落，这可能预示后续报告中能源通胀压力将有所缓解。
summaries.en: JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Meera Pandit forecasts the upcoming U.S. CPI report will show inflation above 4%. She notes that gasoline prices peaked in late May and have been declining, a trend expected to ease inflationary pressures from energy in subsequent reports.

items.summary: 摩根大通资产管理公司全球市场策略师梅拉·潘迪特预测，即将发布的美国CPI数据将高于4%。她同时指出，汽油价格已于5月底达到峰值并持续回落，这可能预示后续报告中能源通胀压力将有所缓解。

items.title: Zambia’s $65 Million Sweetener Wins Support for Bond Buyback
items.content: Zambia has received enough support from bondholders to buy back its 2053 dollar debt in full, after offering an extra $65 million to pull in a group of holdout creditors that resisted the transaction.
items.contentSnippet: Zambia has received enough support from bondholders to buy back its 2053 dollar debt in full, after offering an extra $65 million to pull in a group of holdout creditors that resisted the transaction.
items.creator: Matthew Hill, Constantine Courcoulas

summaries.zh: 赞比亚通过额外提供6500万美元，成功获得足够债券持有人支持，得以全额回购其2053年到期的美元债务。此举旨在吸引此前反对该交易的部分债权人，从而推动债务重组进程。
summaries.en: Zambia has secured sufficient backing from bondholders to fully buy back its 2053-maturity US dollar debt. The country secured this agreement by offering an additional $65 million to persuade a group of holdout creditors who had initially resisted the transaction. This move allows the Zambian government to retire the specific debt early as part of its broader debt restructuring efforts.

items.summary: 赞比亚通过额外提供6500万美元，成功获得足够债券持有人支持，得以全额回购其2053年到期的美元债务。此举旨在吸引此前反对该交易的部分债权人，从而推动债务重组进程。

items.title: Bond Backed by French SME Loans Looks to Open a New Market
items.content: French state-backed lender Bpifrance SACA sold a new type of bond backed by small company loans as it pushed to end a more than decade-long regulatory impasse over European Secured Notes.
items.contentSnippet: French state-backed lender Bpifrance SACA sold a new type of bond backed by small company loans as it pushed to end a more than decade-long regulatory impasse over European Secured Notes.
items.creator: Tasos Vossos, Ronan Martin

summaries.zh: 法国国有贷款机构法国国家投资银行（Bpifrance）发行了一种以中小企业贷款为抵押的新型债券，旨在解决欧洲担保票据长达十多年的监管僵局。
summaries.en: French state-owned lender Bpifrance SACA has issued a new bond backed by loans to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). This move is part of an effort to resolve a longstanding regulatory impasse concerning the development of the European Secured Notes market.

items.summary: 法国国有贷款机构法国国家投资银行（Bpifrance）发行了一种以中小企业贷款为抵押的新型债券，旨在解决欧洲担保票据长达十多年的监管僵局。

items.title: Sugar Swings as Traders Weigh Brazil Output Against Deficit Risk
items.content: Sugar futures fluctuated in New York as traders weighed ample Brazilian supplies against mounting El Niño risks that could tighten global supplies later this year.
items.contentSnippet: Sugar futures fluctuated in New York as traders weighed ample Brazilian supplies against mounting El Niño risks that could tighten global supplies later this year.
items.creator: Mumbi Gitau

summaries.zh: 纽约原糖期货价格出现波动，交易员正在权衡巴西供应充足与今年晚些时候可能出现的厄尔尼诺风险——后者可能导致全球食糖供应趋紧。
summaries.en: Sugar futures in New York saw price fluctuations as traders evaluated two opposing factors: currently ample supplies from Brazil and the increasing risk of El Niño, which could reduce global supplies later in the year.

items.summary: 纽约原糖期货价格出现波动，交易员正在权衡巴西供应充足与今年晚些时候可能出现的厄尔尼诺风险——后者可能导致全球食糖供应趋紧。

items.title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/9/2026
items.content: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 《彭博社观察》是一档由乔纳森·费罗、丽莎·阿布拉莫维奇和安玛丽·霍登主持的每日财经节目。该节目邀请华尔街及华盛顿等地的领袖与决策者进行对话，为投资者和企业高管提供交易日的关键市场信息与分析。
summaries.en: Bloomberg Surveillance is a daily program hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz, and Annmarie Hordern. The show features discussions with leaders and decision-makers from finance and government. It aims to provide investors and executives with insights to prepare for the trading day.

items.summary: 《彭博社观察》是一档由乔纳森·费罗、丽莎·阿布拉莫维奇和安玛丽·霍登主持的每日财经节目。该节目邀请华尔街及华盛顿等地的领袖与决策者进行对话，为投资者和企业高管提供交易日的关键市场信息与分析。

items.title: Korean Won Resilience Amid Equity Outflows
items.content: Dayeon Hong, NATIXIS APAC Rates & FX Strategist, discussed the recent dynamics in South Korea's financial markets, highlighting the resilience of the Korean won despite significant equity sell-offs and foreign outflows. Government interventions and hedging by the National Pension Service have supported the won's appreciation. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Dayeon Hong, NATIXIS APAC Rates & FX Strategist, discussed the recent dynamics in South Korea's financial markets, highlighting the resilience of the Korean won despite significant equity sell-offs and foreign outflows. Government interventions and hedging by the National Pension Service have supported the won's appreciation. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 韩国金融市场上，尽管出现外资大量流出和股市抛售，韩元仍表现出较强韧性。政府干预和韩国国民年金的套期保值操作支撑了韩元走强。来源：彭博社。
summaries.en: Despite significant foreign equity sell-offs and outflows from South Korea, the Korean won has shown resilience. Government interventions and hedging activities by the National Pension Service have provided support, enabling the currency to appreciate.

items.summary: 韩国金融市场上，尽管出现外资大量流出和股市抛售，韩元仍表现出较强韧性。政府干预和韩国国民年金的套期保值操作支撑了韩元走强。来源：彭博社。

items.title: Emerging Assets Stage Rebound as Sharp Losses Lure Dip Buyers
items.content: Emerging-market assets rallied on Tuesday, with investors buying the dip in shares of Asian companies tied to the artificial intelligence theme and currencies rebounding after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.
items.contentSnippet: Emerging-market assets rallied on Tuesday, with investors buying the dip in shares of Asian companies tied to the artificial intelligence theme and currencies rebounding after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.
items.creator: Srinivasan Sivabalan, Vinicius Andrade

summaries.zh: 周二，受伊朗与以色列暂停敌对行动的影响，新兴市场资产出现反弹。投资者逢低买入亚洲人工智能相关企业股票，同时推动货币升值。
summaries.en: Emerging-market assets experienced a rebound on Tuesday. The rally was driven by investors purchasing shares of Asian companies linked to artificial intelligence after a sharp decline. Additionally, emerging-market currencies recovered as geopolitical tensions eased following a pause in hostilities between Iran and Israel. The market movement indicated a "buy the dip" response to recent losses.

items.summary: 周二，受伊朗与以色列暂停敌对行动的影响，新兴市场资产出现反弹。投资者逢低买入亚洲人工智能相关企业股票，同时推动货币升值。

items.title: Inflation Pressures Rise in Asia Despite Fuel Price Caps
items.content: Deepali Bhargava, ING Head of Research and Chief Economist for APAC, discussed the current inflation dynamics in Asia in the context of recent geopolitical developments, including a fragile ceasefire and renewed tensions in the Middle East. She highlighted that growth across Asia has remained stronger than expected, supported in part by the tech export sector. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Deepali Bhargava, ING Head of Research and Chief Economist for APAC, discussed the current inflation dynamics in Asia in the context of recent geopolitical developments, including a fragile ceasefire and renewed tensions in the Middle East. She highlighted that growth across Asia has remained stronger than expected, supported in part by the tech export sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 亚洲多国通胀压力上升，尽管实施了燃油价格管控。ING亚太区首席经济学家Deepali Bhargava指出，受中东紧张局势等地缘政治因素影响，通胀形势严峻。但另一方面，科技出口等行业支撑下，亚洲整体经济增长仍超预期。
summaries.en: Deepali Bhargava, ING's Head of Research and Chief Economist for APAC, noted that inflation pressures in Asia are increasing despite fuel price caps. This occurs amid geopolitical tensions, including a fragile ceasefire in the Middle East. She emphasized that regional economic growth has outperformed expectations, partly driven by robust tech exports. The information was sourced from Bloomberg.

items.summary: 亚洲多国通胀压力上升，尽管实施了燃油价格管控。ING亚太区首席经济学家Deepali Bhargava指出，受中东紧张局势等地缘政治因素影响，通胀形势严峻。但另一方面，科技出口等行业支撑下，亚洲整体经济增长仍超预期。

items.title: Basque Region Sells €500 Million Bond for Industrial Policy
items.content: The Basque government raised €500 million ($577 million) in a sale of bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.
items.contentSnippet: The Basque government raised €500 million ($577 million) in a sale of bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.
items.creator: Ronan Martin

summaries.zh: 巴斯克政府发行5亿欧元债券，用于支持该西班牙地区的工业投资战略。
summaries.en: The Basque government sold €500 million in bonds to fund its regional industrial investment strategy. The funds will support economic development initiatives within the autonomous community. This financing is part of the government's planned approach to bolster local industry.

items.summary: 巴斯克政府发行5亿欧元债券，用于支持该西班牙地区的工业投资战略。

items.title: Schwab's Sonders Warns of 'Red Flags,' Possible Inflationary Boom
items.content: Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders says markets may have become complacent about the economic impact of rising energy prices. Speaking with Vonnie Quinn on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Sonders says the economy is on the brink of a potential spike in oil prices and there's a big disconnect between the soft, survey-based economic data and the actual hard data. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: Charles Schwab Chief Investment Strategist Liz Ann Sonders says markets may have become complacent about the economic impact of rising energy prices. Speaking with Vonnie Quinn on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Sonders says the economy is on the brink of a potential spike in oil prices and there's a big disconnect between the soft, survey-based economic data and the actual hard data. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 嘉信理财首席投资策略师丽兹·安·桑德斯警告，市场可能对能源价格上涨的经济影响过于乐观。她指出，经济正处于油价飙升的边缘，且基于调查的疲软经济数据与实际硬数据之间存在巨大脱节。这暗示可能出现通胀性繁荣风险。
summaries.en: Charles Schwab's Chief Investment Strategist, Liz Ann Sonders, has issued a warning about potential market complacency regarding rising energy prices. She highlighted a significant disconnect between soft, survey-based economic indicators and actual hard data. According to Sonders, the economy is approaching a potential spike in oil prices, which could lead to an inflationary boom, presenting several "red flags" that investors may be overlooking.

items.summary: 嘉信理财首席投资策略师丽兹·安·桑德斯警告，市场可能对能源价格上涨的经济影响过于乐观。她指出，经济正处于油价飙升的边缘，且基于调查的疲软经济数据与实际硬数据之间存在巨大脱节。这暗示可能出现通胀性繁荣风险。

items.title: Treasury Market Signals Rates Need to Be Higher
items.content:
The $31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message for Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve: Interest rates aren’t high enough. 
The reset upwards only intensified last week after the latest read on job growth topped all forecasts, reinforcing a growing conviction that rates need to rise in order to rein in inflation pressures and temper the risk of an AI-induced boom overheating the economy.
David Seif, Chief Economist for Developed Markets at Nomura, discusses his expectations for the Fed's path forward. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet:
The $31 trillion Treasury market has an unequivocal message for Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve: Interest rates aren’t high enough. 
The reset upwards only intensified last week after the latest read on job growth topped all forecasts, reinforcing a growing conviction that rates need to rise in order to rein in inflation pressures and temper the risk of an AI-induced boom overheating the economy.
David Seif, Chief Economist for Developed Markets at Nomura, discusses his expectations for the Fed's path forward. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 美国31万亿美元国债市场明确传递信号：当前利率水平仍不足。上周强劲的就业数据进一步强化了市场共识，认为美联储需继续加息以抑制通胀，并防范人工智能热潮可能导致的经济过热风险。这表明市场预期美联储将继续采取紧缩货币政策。
summaries.en: The $31 trillion U.S. Treasury market signals that interest rates need to rise further. This conviction intensified after stronger-than-expected job growth, reinforcing the view that higher rates are necessary to control inflation and prevent the economy from overheating, potentially driven by an AI-related boom. The market's message is directed at the Federal Reserve.

items.summary: 美国31万亿美元国债市场明确传递信号：当前利率水平仍不足。上周强劲的就业数据进一步强化了市场共识，认为美联储需继续加息以抑制通胀，并防范人工智能热潮可能导致的经济过热风险。这表明市场预期美联储将继续采取紧缩货币政策。

items.title: Bonds Drop as Israel-Iran Strikes Raise Inflation Fears
items.content: US stocks have staged a modest rebound even as flaring tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices and bond yields higher.  Futures for the S&P 500 rose 0.2% after a selloff in artificial intelligence stocks came to a halt. Bond traders are wagering that inflation figures this week will show the biggest surge in consumer prices in several years, adding to pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Global bond markets have seen a profound shift since late February, when the US and Israel's attacks on Iran sparked a surge in oil prices, derailing bets that the central bank was poised to lower rates in 2026. Lindsay Rosner, Head of Multi-Sector Investing at Goldman Sachs Asset Management explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet: US stocks have staged a modest rebound even as flaring tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices and bond yields higher.  Futures for the S&P 500 rose 0.2% after a selloff in artificial intelligence stocks came to a halt. Bond traders are wagering that inflation figures this week will show the biggest surge in consumer prices in several years, adding to pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Global bond markets have seen a profound shift since late February, when the US and Israel's attacks on Iran sparked a surge in oil prices, derailing bets that the central bank was poised to lower rates in 2026. Lindsay Rosner, Head of Multi-Sector Investing at Goldman Sachs Asset Management explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 中东紧张局势导致油价与债券收益率上升，市场担忧通胀加剧。受此前人工智能股票抛售暂停影响，美股标普500指数期货小幅上涨0.2%。债券交易员预计本周通胀数据将显示数年来最大涨幅，这加大了美联储加息的压力。自2月底美以袭击伊朗引发油价飙升以来，全球债市已发生重大转变，市场对央行2026年降息的预期被彻底扭转。
summaries.en: US stocks rebounded modestly as Middle East tensions boosted oil prices and bond yields. Bond traders now expect this week's inflation data to show a significant rise, increasing pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Global bond markets have shifted since late February when US and Israeli strikes on Iran caused an oil price surge, derailing expectations for Fed rate cuts in 2026. The geopolitical conflict has intensified concerns that higher energy costs will drive broader inflation.

items.summary: 中东紧张局势导致油价与债券收益率上升，市场担忧通胀加剧。受此前人工智能股票抛售暂停影响，美股标普500指数期货小幅上涨0.2%。债券交易员预计本周通胀数据将显示数年来最大涨幅，这加大了美联储加息的压力。自2月底美以袭击伊朗引发油价飙升以来，全球债市已发生重大转变，市场对央行2026年降息的预期被彻底扭转。

items.title: Airbus Unsure of Reaching A320 Target Due to Pratt Problems
items.content: Airbus SE is unsure of reaching next year’s production target for its best-selling A320 jet because Pratt & Whitney may not be able to supply enough engines, the planemaker’s chief executive officer said.
items.contentSnippet: Airbus SE is unsure of reaching next year’s production target for its best-selling A320 jet because Pratt & Whitney may not be able to supply enough engines, the planemaker’s chief executive officer said.
items.creator: Leen Al-Rashdan, Benedikt Kammel

summaries.zh: 空客首席执行官表示，由于发动机供应商普惠公司可能无法提供足够数量的发动机，空客对其最畅销的A320系列飞机明年能否达成生产目标尚不确定。
summaries.en: Airbus CEO stated that the company may not meet its 2024 production target for the A320 family of aircraft. The primary reason cited is a potential insufficient engine supply from Pratt & Whitney, which could disrupt the planned manufacturing output.

items.summary: 空客首席执行官表示，由于发动机供应商普惠公司可能无法提供足够数量的发动机，空客对其最畅销的A320系列飞机明年能否达成生产目标尚不确定。

items.title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as Oil Falls Below $90
items.content:
A rebound on Wall Street powered ahead, with stocks joining bonds higher as oil fell amid hopes the US and Iran are getting closer to a deal to end the war that has rattled global markets.
Liz Ann Sonders, Chief Investment Strategist at Charles Schwab, discusses her midyear outlook as the market drives higher. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.contentSnippet:
A rebound on Wall Street powered ahead, with stocks joining bonds higher as oil fell amid hopes the US and Iran are getting closer to a deal to end the war that has rattled global markets.
Liz Ann Sonders, Chief Investment Strategist at Charles Schwab, discusses her midyear outlook as the market drives higher. (Source: Bloomberg)

summaries.zh: 受美伊两国或接近达成结束冲突协议的乐观预期影响，国际油价跌破90美元。受此推动，华尔街市场反弹，美国股市与债券价格双双上涨。
summaries.en: Wall Street saw a rebound, with stocks and bonds rising together as oil prices fell below $90. This movement is tied to hopes that the U.S. and Iran may be nearing a deal to end the ongoing conflict, which has disrupted global markets. The update includes remarks from Liz Ann Sonders, Chief Investment Strategist at Charles Schwab, on her midyear market outlook.

items.summary: 受美伊两国或接近达成结束冲突协议的乐观预期影响，国际油价跌破90美元。受此推动，华尔街市场反弹，美国股市与债券价格双双上涨。

items.title: Apotex Targets Top End of Range in Biggest Canada IPO Since 2021
items.content: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering to price at the top of the marketing range later Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.
items.contentSnippet: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering to price at the top of the marketing range later Tuesday, according to people familiar with the matter.
items.creator: Anthony Hughes, Kelly Gilblom

summaries.zh: 加拿大制药企业Apotex健康公司（Apotex Health Corp.）计划于周二晚在多伦多进行首次公开募股（IPO）。据知情人士透露，该公司正引导投资者预期其IPO发行价将定于路演推荐价格区间的上限。这将是加拿大自2021年以来规模最大的一笔IPO交易。
summaries.en: Apotex Health Corp. is guiding investors to expect its Toronto initial public offering (IPO) to price at the top of its marketing range on Tuesday. This will mark the largest Canadian IPO since 2021.

items.summary: 加拿大制药企业Apotex健康公司（Apotex Health Corp.）计划于周二晚在多伦多进行首次公开募股（IPO）。据知情人士透露，该公司正引导投资者预期其IPO发行价将定于路演推荐价格区间的上限。这将是加拿大自2021年以来规模最大的一笔IPO交易。
